blended.narrative: Tremblant (Gray Rocks) is looking at light snowfall over the next 48 hours, with 2.1 inches of wet, heavy snow expected. Snow levels around 5,197 ft. Looking ahead, 22 inches possible over the next 14 days.

daily_summary.narrative: Wednesday: 8" of heavy snow, highs of 35°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Saturday: 2.9" of snow, highs of 25°F. Expect powder.
Sunday: 2.6" of snow, highs of 24°F. Expect powder.
Monday: 2.2" of snow, highs of 36°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
